heading: Usage Cost Summary
body:
As a user of an Atlas Flex cluster, you pay between $8 and $30 for
30 days of usage. As for all Atlas clusters, the Flex cluster
tier follows a pay-as-you-go model billed hourly.

The following table outlines the pricing for Flex clusters. Note that
there is a volume discount as your usage increases.

| Tier (ops/second) | Marginal Monthly Cost | Effective Discount | Total Monthly Cost | Total Hourly Cost |
| ----------------- | --------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------ | ----------------- |
| 0 - 100 (Base)    | $8.00                 | 0%                 | $8.00              | $0.0110           |
| 100 - 200         | $7.00                 | 12.5%              | $15.00             | $0.0205           |
| 200 - 300         | $6.00                 | 25%                | $21.00             | $0.0288           |
| 300 - 400         | $5.00                 | 37.5%              | $26.00             | $0.0356           |
| 400 - 500         | $4.00                 | 50%                | $30.00             | $0.0411           |
